recommendations.overview: Two university students gain insight into life and love as they get to know each other during a road trip across Europe.

recommendations.title: 4L
recommendations.overview: To find Joseba, a dying friend, and see him reunite with his daughter Ely, two old friends, Jean Pierre and Tocho, embark with her on a road trip through the Sahara desert, from Spain to Mali.

recommendations.title: Les Francis
recommendations.overview: Comical trip to Corse reminiscent of A very bad trip.

recommendations.title: Microbe and Gasoline
recommendations.overview: Two young friends embark on a road trip across France in a vehicle they built themselves.

recommendations.title: House
recommendations.overview: Hoping to find a sense of connection to her late mother, Gorgeous takes a trip with her friends to visit her aunt's ancestral house in the countryside. The girls soon discover that there is more to the old house than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: Not Cool
recommendations.overview: Former prom king Scott returns home for Thanksgiving break and gets dumped by his long-term girlfriend. With his world turned upside down, Scott strikes an unlikely friendship with former classmate Tori, an ugly duckling who blossomed in her first se

recommendations.title: Victoria
recommendations.overview: A young Spanish woman who has newly moved to Berlin finds her flirtation with a local guy turn potentially deadly as their night out with his friends reveals a dangerous secret.

recommendations.title: Goodbye World
recommendations.overview: When a mysterious cyber-attack cripples civilization, a group of old college friends and lovers retreat to a remote country cabin, where they must cope with an uncertain future while navigating the minefield of their shared past.

recommendations.title: Among Friends
recommendations.overview: Three longtime friends set off on a boat trip with their romantic partners, but inclement weather, jealousy and confessions, will put to test their friendships.

recommendations.title: Dirty Girl
recommendations.overview: Accompanied by her closeted gay buddy, a promiscuous teenager sets out to find her long-absent father.
